data.title: Centrifuge V3 launches, enabling tokenization of real-world assets on six EVM chains via Wormhole's multi-chain support.
data.description: The migration of Centrifuge to its V3 version has been successfully completed. This upgrade enables improved tokenization of real-world assets on a wider scale, covering six EVM chains utilizing Wormhole's multichain infrastructure. This development marks a significant step forward in expanding the reach and capabilities of Centrifuge, benefiting users seeking to tokenize assets across different chains.

data.title: Formula 1, owned by Liberty Formula One Group, is predicted to see 8% yearly revenue growth by 2028. Goldman Sachs targets the stock at $120 with a Buy rating.
data.description: Goldman Sachs has reinstated coverage of Liberty Formula One Group with a Buy rating and a 12-month price target of $120, showing a 17% potential return. Analyst Stephen Laszczyk believes it's a high-quality growth story with significant capital return potential. Formula One's revenue is expected to grow annually by 8% till 2028, with adjusted operating income projected to increase by 15% each year. The new Concorde Agreement from 2026 will boost margins, with gains in Race Promotion, Media Rights, and Sponsorship. F1 is leveraging the supply-demand dynamic for hosting Grand Prix events, especially in legacy European venues and emerging markets like the U.S. The Las Vegas Grand Prix is set to rebound. Formula 1 is seen as a top pick in the global sports media sector by the firm.

GURU, recognized as Canada's primary organic energy drink brand, made this announcement.

data.title: Files.com acquires ExpanDrive, offers free version for personal use, enabling access to cloud platforms and remote servers.
data.description: In TEMPE, Arizona, Files.com, a prominent platform for secure and automated file transfer, declared the acquisition of ExpanDrive, a desktop application facilitating access to cloud and remote storage as local drives. Following the acquisition, ExpanDrive is now accessible for personal use at no cost under a newly introduced freemium pricing strategy. ExpanDrive enables users to connect with cloud platforms and remote servers, such as SFTP, Amazon S3, Google Drive, and Dropbox, directly from their desktops.

data.title: France and UK sign nuclear deal to counter Russia, close ties amid US NATO criticism. Coordinate nuclear defense + develop contingency plans, share intelligence to retain control of their nuclear programs, establish Nuclear Steering Group. EU to deploy €800 billion for defense amid US concerns about withdrawing from the region. French President Macron on UK visit. Paris, Starmer sign Northwood Declaration. Europe wants to build military capabilities in response to Russia's aggression in Ukraine. Allard: Moscow to factor in French and British coordination. US sees declaration as step to strengthen Europe's defense and deterrence capabilities.756;874.
data.description: France and the United Kingdom have agreed on coordinating their nuclear defense efforts to support European deterrence against Russia through the Northwood Declaration. This marks the first time both nations have collaborated on nuclear defense. The agreement was signed during French President Macron's visit to the UK. The European Union plans to allocate €800 billion for defense due to concerns about the US withdrawing from the region. The US views the declaration as a positive step towards strengthening European defense capabilities. The countries will establish a Nuclear Steering Group to coordinate nuclear policy, capabilities, and operations. They reaffirmed their commitment to the Treaty on the Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons and their roles as nuclear powers in NATO's deterrence. Macron emphasized the importance of their alliance making a difference globally.

data.title: Sirion named a Leader in IDC MarketScape for AI-Enabled Buy-Side Contract Lifecycle Management. 2nd consecutive recognition.
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, Sirion, a top AI-native contract lifecycle management (CLM) firm, was declared a Leader in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide AI-Enabled Buy-Side Contract Life-Cycle Management Applications 2025 Vendor Assessment (doc #US53575125, June 2025). This is the second time Sirion has achieved this acknowledgment. The report underlines the platform’s strong emphasis on risk management. Interested parties can access a partial report via download.

data.title: East Coast Wings + Grill celebrates National Chicken Wing Day on July 29 with 25-cent wings, Flavor Frenzy Challenge, and new mascot.
data.description: A popular franchise of full-service restaurants is set to commemorate National Chicken Wing Day on July 29 by offering chicken wings for just 25 cents. Additionally, ECW+G franchise will kick off a year-long Flavor Frenzy Challenge, providing loyal customers with perks and the chance to win a grand prize. Alongside these promotions, the franchise will also introduce Coop, a new chicken mascot who will become part of the restaurant's family.

data.title: Veritas Prime expands in India and Argentina, strengthening BPaaS model for HR & Payroll services globally.
data.description: Veritas Prime, a prominent global company specializing in HR and Payroll technology and professional services, revealed today two significant achievements in its international expansion efforts. The company is emphasizing delivery excellence and innovation in Business Process as a Service (BPaaS) as it aims to strengthen its presence globally.

data.description: The price of MATIC is currently hovering around the $0.37 support level, with Polygon's technical analysis indicating bearish signals from the MACD indicator and oversold conditions. These signs suggest a potential reversal or breakdown in the near future.
